hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    f = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
except:
    f = ''
if f.endswith('.py'):
    import subprocess
    subprocess.run(['poetry', 'run', 'black', f], cwd='/home/hch/nietzsche-project/apps/api', capture_output=True)
    subprocess.run(['poetry', 'run', 'isort', f], cwd='/home/hch/nietzsche-project/apps/api', capture_output=True)
elif f.endswith(('.ts', '.tsx')):
    import subprocess
    subprocess.run(['npx', 'prettier', '--write', f], cwd='/home/hch/nietzsche-project/apps/web', capture_output=True)
"
